---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Teaching Philosophy

I view literature and cultural studies as opportunities for students to examine how narratives shape ideas of identity, history, and social experience. My teaching emphasizes close reading, critical discussion, and the relationship between literary texts, visual media, and contemporary cultural questions. I have gained extensive experience as an Instructor of Record at Binghamton University, and I am currently based in Seoul, where I continue to teach literature and media studies.

---

## Courses Taught

### Literature and Culture

- British Literature and Film
- Korean Modern Literature and Film
- Contested Americas: Culture, Media, and Society

### Film and Media

- Best Picture: Oscar Winners
- Hip-Hop: Culture of Voice

### Writing

- Inquiry and Academic Writing (WRIT 111)
- Writing 110
